[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] '''Kiner''' served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a counterintelligence [[Officer/Legends|officer]]. By the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Kiner was considered to be the last respected counterintelligence agent. It was believed that [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence's]] [[Renik]] branch derived their name from Kiner's by reversing it.
